title: Gene Expression in Wheat through Comparative Transcriptomics
content: S-BSST1353 Gene Expression in Wheat through Comparative Transcriptomics The sequence data quality was checked using FastQC [1] and MultiQC [2] software. The data was checked for base call quality distribution, % bases above Q20, Q30, %GC, and sequencing adapter contamination (Table 1; Figure 2-3
